name: BST Operations — Insert, Delete, Validate, Kth, Iterator

metadata.career_relevance: Validate BST and Kth Smallest are top-5 BST questions. BST Delete tests understanding of inorder successor. BST Iterator is a Google medium favorite.

hook.real_world_problem:
// BST property: left<node<right at every node
// Validate: pass (lo,hi) bounds down — common gotcha: use Long not Integer
hook.what_you_will_build: Search, insert, delete, validate, kth smallest, LCA, iterator.

concept_explanation.validate: Pass (lo, hi) bounds. Long.MIN/MAX handles Integer.MIN_VALUE edge case.

key_takeaways: Validate BST: pass (lo,hi) not just check parent
Kth smallest: inorder traversal, stop at kth node
Delete 2-children: replace with inorder successor (leftmost of right subtree)
BST LCA: use BST property → O(h) not O(n)
BST Iterator: O(h) space stack; push lefts; next() pops + pushes right's lefts
Greater Sum Tree: reverse inorder (R-N-L) with running sum
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Path Problems — binary tree path sum variations.
